message: Initialized compliance and IAP planning artifacts before implementation.
Implemented ATT, permission keys, protocol WebView, relative media storage, upload, and album export.
Implemented 27-product Store, lazy IAP service, idempotent credit ledger, global balance entry, and fixed 10-credit spend point.
Static analysis, tests, and iOS simulator build passed.
Compliance tracker, IAP tracker, test matrix, feature coverage, and layout audit updated.

Fixed iOS simulator launch crash by moving Flutter plugin registration to SceneDelegate, replacing the crashing ATT plugin with a native MethodChannel, and restoring Runner resource packaging for Assets.car and storyboards.
Final simulator launch reached the Line Board screen with Runner PID 95035 active and no SIGSEGV or missing-icon log matches in the final narrow query.
Archived both requested SKILL.md files in full original form and documented the two follow-up documentation change rounds in the project review.

Removed the shared settings action from Store, reduced primary navigation to Board/Batch/Photos/Store, hid built-in assets/images from UI photo display, promoted uploaded album photos to the three large proof heroes, and moved save-to-album onto the primary proof image.

Restored Store to render all 27 product identifiers and added direct Store links to User Agreement and Privacy Policy while keeping the Settings policy links intact and leaving the Store settings icon removed.
Recheck passed with 12 widget tests, full 27-product Store rendering, Store and Settings policy entries, Runner PID 89263 active, and no Runner SIGSEGV/No icon found/Process exited/Fatal log matches.

Fixed Board save semantics so state saves write local records, link uploaded proof photo paths, restore media/session state, show proof readback in Batch and Photos, derive Service Clock readback from current data, and remove the Board station-card overflow.

Board save self-review passed with 13 widget tests, Runner PID 63306 active, no Runner SIGSEGV/No icon found/Process exited/Fatal log matches, and final screenshot /private/tmp/prepline-board-save-records-final.png.
